summary: Comprehensive testing of Mitti Basket Admin Panel. All core features working correctly: Admin login/logout, Dashboard stats, Products CRUD (list, create, edit, delete, stock toggle), Orders management (list, filter, status update), Customers list. Backend API tests: 21/22 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed. Customer-facing site has no regression.

minor.issue: Brute force protection test inconclusive - lockout is per IP:email combination, test environment IP may differ from actual client IP through Kubernetes ingress

passed_tests: Admin login with valid credentials (basketmitti@gmail.com / MItti3025@#)
Admin login rejects invalid credentials (401)
Admin login rejects wrong password (401)
Admin /me endpoint returns admin info with valid token
Admin /me endpoint rejects unauthenticated requests (401)
Admin logout endpoint works
Admin dashboard returns all stats: total_orders, paid_orders, pending_orders, failed_orders, total_revenue, top_products, recent_orders, customer_count, today_orders
Admin dashboard rejects unauthorized access (401)
Admin products list returns 20 products with images, categories, prices
Admin product create works (POST /api/admin/products)
Admin product update price works (PUT /api/admin/products/{id})
Admin product stock toggle works (PATCH /api/admin/products/{id}/stock)
Admin product delete works (DELETE /api/admin/products/{id})
Admin orders list returns 17 orders with payment/order status
Admin orders filter by payment status works
Admin orders filter by order status works
Admin order status update to Shipped works (adds shipped_at timestamp)
Admin order status update to Delivered works (adds delivered_at timestamp)
Admin customers list returns 9 unique customers with order count and total spent
Public products API (/api/products) returns products grouped by category
Razorpay webhook rejects unsigned requests (returns invalid_signature)
Frontend: Admin login page loads with email, password inputs and Sign In button
Frontend: Invalid login shows error message
Frontend: Valid login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats cards (Revenue, Orders, Customers, Pending)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Recent Orders list
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works (Dashboard, Products, Orders, Customers)
Frontend: Products page shows 20 products with search and category filter
Frontend: Add Product modal opens with all fields
Frontend: Product creation works via modal
Frontend: Orders page shows 17 orders with filters
Frontend: Order detail modal shows customer info, items, payment status
Frontend: Order status update works from modal
Frontend: Customers page shows 9 customers with summary cards
Frontend: Logout redirects to login page
Customer-facing homepage works correctly (no regression)
Customer-facing Mango Harvest page displays products
failed_tests: Brute force lockout test (inconclusive - IP-based tracking may not work in test environment)
critical_code_review_comments: Admin panel implementation is solid with proper JWT authentication, role-based access control, and comprehensive CRUD operations

Brute force protection is implemented correctly (5 attempts, 15 min lockout) but uses IP:email identifier which may not work reliably behind load balancers/proxies - consider adding X-Forwarded-For header support
All admin routes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Dashboard aggregation queries are efficient using MongoDB aggregation pipeline
seed_data_creation: Test products created during testing were cleaned up (TEST_Admin_Product, TEST_Update_Price_Product, TEST_Toggle_Stock_Product, TEST_Delete_Product, TEST_UI_Product)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully tested and working. All CRUD operations verified. Dashboard shows: 17 orders, 9 customers, 16 pending, 1 failed, ₹0 revenue (no paid orders yet). Products: 20 total across 4 categories (Season Harvest, Village Pantry, Festive, Secret Garden). Customer-facing site working with no regression. Brute force protection is implemented but test was inconclusive due to IP tracking through Kubernetes ingress.
